def negative_python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_debug_mode_enabled_in_perf_sensitive_path():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_debug_mode_enabled_in_perf_sensitive_path"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag framework debug or reload mode enabled in performance-sensitive runtime config."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
